title: Applied TaCZ
description: AppliedTaCZ is a addon that connects Applied Energistics 2 with Timeless and Classics Zero, letting TaCZ workbenches use items directly from the ME network
body:
Applied TaCZ

AppliedTaCZ is mod that integrates **Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ)** workbenches with **Applied Energistics 2 (AE2)**. It adds AE-Support versions of TaCZ workbenches so you can view crafting ingredients from both the player inventory and the ME network, then consume them directly while crafting. ## Feature - AE-Support versions of TaCZ workbenches - Combined ingredient counts from player inventory and AE2 network - Crafting that consumes player inventory first, then ME network storage ## Support Workbench | Workbench | Base Mod | AE Support | |-----------|----------|------------| | Gun Smith Table | TaCZ | ✔️ | | Ammo Workbench | TaCZ | ✔️ | | Attachment Workbench | TaCZ | ✔️ | ## License - code: `GNU GPL 3.0` - TaCZ assets: `CC BY-NC-ND 4.0` by the TaCZ team
